title: Fleet Ops Headquarters
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Fleet Ops Headquarters''' was located on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was in a plaza with a [[Gold/Legends|gold]]-veined [[Marble/Legends|marble]] fountain in the middle.

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]''
